summary: Gwangjin's DPK wins (이정헌 52.53, 고민정 51.47) reflect a mixed residential base. 광진 을's 고민정 (former presidential spokesperson) is a national figure; margins are competitive rather than dominant.

issues.label: 고민정's national profile (을)
issues.description: 고민정's visibility as former presidential spokesperson elevates 광진 을 beyond typical local politics.
